scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/middleware/security.middleware.js && node --check src/routes/auth.routes.js && node --check src/routes/voting.routes.js && node --check src/routes/election.routes.js && node --check src/routes/candidate.routes.js && node --check src/routes/admin.routes.js && node --check src/routes/voter.routes.js && node --check src/routes/fraud.routes.js && node --check src/routes/dispute.routes.js && node --check src/routes/delegation.routes.js && node --check src/routes/health.routes.js && node --check src/sockets/socketManager.js && node --check src/services/blockchain.service.js && node --check src/services/blockchain.sync.service.js && node --check src/services/notification.service.js && node --check src/services/pii.crypto.service.js && node --check src/services/upload.security.service.js && node --check src/services/fraud.detection.service.js && node --check src/services/identity.verification.service.js && node --check src/services/zkp.proof.service.js && node --check src/services/emergency.service.js && node --check src/services/governance.service.js && node --check src/utils/retention.js && node --check src/utils/seed.js
scripts.build: npm run check && npx prisma generate
scripts.db:reset: npx prisma migrate reset --force && npm run db:seed
